settings.title: Made on 30A
settings.body: Stitched by hand on the panhandle. Salt-tested before they ship.

settings.title: 8 or 32 panel
settings.body: Classic 8-panel for chill circles. 32-panel for the pros stalling at sunset.

settings.title: First 90 only
settings.body: When the 90 are claimed, we close the list. No restock guaranteed.
